site.name: Roger Weißenbrunner
site.description: Full-stack engineer specializing in Ruby, PostgreSQL, and open source. Building reliable software with 20+ years of experience.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a full-stack software engineer with a passion for solving real-world problems and building tools that improve people's lives by turning complex requirements into clean code users can trust. Most of my code is written on top of open source platforms, with security and privacy in mind.
about.p2: Outside of work, I have a wide variety of interests. Among others, I love music, chess, photography, travel, and motorcycles.
about.p3End: if you need a professional software developer.

projects.title: Open Source Projects
projects.p1: Alongside my professional work, I maintain a growing collection of open source projects: practical tools and desktop software I build for fun, and as a way to stay sharp with new technologies.
projects.p2: All my projects listed here are published under open source licenses. Feel free to explore these, open issues, send patches, or simply leave a star to show you found some of these worthwhile.
projects.whiteNoiseBlurb: White Noise is a desktop music player for Linux.

projectsWhiteNoise.title: White Noise
projectsWhiteNoise.heroAlt: Screenshot of the White Noise desktop music player on Linux
projectsWhiteNoise.p1: White Noise is a desktop music player for Linux. It is aimed at people with large local libraries who also want internet radio, audio CDs, playlists, and a few quality-of-life touches (covers, MTP devices, ID3 tagging) without the app getting in the way.
projectsWhiteNoise.p2Before: It is a fork and a rewrite of

services.title: My Services
services.rubyBody: Ruby is an open source programming language that started in 1995 and has become popular thanks to the Rails framework, which implements the MVC architecture with patterns that enable convention over configuration. Technical details aside, it enables software developers to focus on the business problems they are solving.
services.postgresBody: PostgreSQL is the most advanced open source relational database management system. It is known for its reliability, extensibility, scalability, performance, and standards compliance. Its feature-rich query system allows analysts to produce complex reports that can be used to transform data into operational knowledge for decision making.
